description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, tactical design with a predominantly metallic and polymer construction. The body is a mix of matte black, silver, and gray tones, accented by orange and red highlights, particularly near the ammunition chamber and trigger area. The barrel is long and slender, with visible ribbing and venting along the top, suggesting enhanced heat dissipation. The stock is compact and angular, with a pistol grip integrated into the lower receiver for ergonomic handling. Several cylindrical shells are visible in a side-mounted holder, and the fore-end appears reinforced with textured grip surfaces. The overall build suggests a high-tech, urban combat shotgun with advanced materials and modular components.
description: A sleek, modern shotgun with a long ribbed barrel, compact stock, and visible shell holder, finished in black, silver, and orange accents. Its design is tactical and futuristic, suited for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the ribbed barrel, shell holder, and angular stock.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow barrel opening and the alignment of the upper ribbing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the shell holder, trigger area, and the detailed grip structure.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the ribbed barrel, venting, and the compactness of the stock and grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with prominent ribbing and venting along the top; long barrel design
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a reinforced lower edge and smooth contour
